Remediation: Add SPF TXT records for: contoso.com. Example: v=spf1 include:spf.protection.outlook.com -all
Enable DKIM for: contoso.onmicrosoft.com, contoso.com. Run: New-DkimSigningConfig -DomainName <domain> -Enabled $true. Microsoft 365 Defender > Email & collaboration > Policies > DKIM.

RecommendedValue: DMARC p=quarantine or p=reject for all
Remediation: Add/update DMARC for: missing: contoso.onmicrosoft.com, contoso.com. Example: v=DMARC1; p=reject; rua=mailto:dmarc@yourdomain.com
